quick_jab.name: Quick Jab
quick_jab.description: A fast strike with a higher critical chance.

guard_up.name: Guard Up
guard_up.description: Raises defense for a few turns.

ember_nip.name: Ember Nip
ember_nip.description: A fiery bite that may burn.

bubble_snap.name: Bubble Snap
bubble_snap.description: A snapping water burst that may slow.

vine_bop.name: Vine Bop
vine_bop.description: A vine strike that may snare.

shadow_pounce.name: Shadow Pounce
shadow_pounce.description: A risky shadow attack with high critical chance.

stone_bump.name: Stone Bump
stone_bump.description: A heavy impact that may stun.

dino_chomp.name: Dino Chomp
dino_chomp.description: A heavy prehistoric bite that may lower defense.

tail_thump.name: Tail Thump
tail_thump.description: A solid tail hit with a small chance to stun.

wing_gust.name: Wing Gust
wing_gust.description: A heated gust that may slow the target.

flame_breath.name: Flame Breath
flame_breath.description: A powerful breath attack that may burn.
